# Zaree Studios

> Zaree Studios builds direct ordering websites for independent UK restaurants and cafés, so owners keep more of every sale instead of paying 14–30% commission to Deliveroo, Just Eat, and Uber Eats.

Zaree Studios is a UK-based service run by founder Ali Haider. Each client gets a custom-built, fast ordering website that routes orders directly to the kitchen (typically via WhatsApp), integrates with Stuart Logistics for delivery, and charges a flat fee instead of a per-order commission.

## Value proposition
- "Your orders. Your margin."
- Aggregators (Deliveroo, Just Eat, Uber Eats) charge 14–30% commission per order.
- Zaree Studios charges a flat monthly fee with no per-order commission.

## Pricing
- **Lump Sum** — £1,999 one-time (50% upfront, 50% on completion). Custom ordering website up to 5 pages, WhatsApp order routing, Stuart Logistics delivery integration, 30 days post-launch support. No ongoing maintenance/hosting included (available as add-ons).
- **Partnership Programme** (recommended) — £149/month, £0 upfront. Everything in Lump Sum plus unlimited updates/maintenance and hosting + domain included.
- **The Enterprise Ecosystem** — from £3,500, custom quote. Multi-location support, loyalty/rewards, advanced analytics, priority turnaround, training videos, EPOS/tablet integration.

## Proof points
- 4.9-star average client rating.
- Real client: Bamboo Garden Restaurant, Birmingham — 5-star review, live in 4 days.
- Typical site: sub-1.8s average page load, 95+ Lighthouse performance score.

## Process
1. Custom Design — collect assets and menu, design the site around the specific restaurant.
2. Order System — build a fast, accessible ordering flow with clean code.
3. Deployment — launch with QA, speed optimization, and post-launch monitoring.

## Contact
- WhatsApp is the primary contact channel (buttons throughout the site link directly to WhatsApp — no contact forms).
- Founder: Ali Haider.

## Pages
